prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.1 kg; Height 152.5 cm; BMI 29.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 277mg/dL; 9 months ago 266mg/dL; 6 months ago 245mg/dL; 3 months ago 212mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.9kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 69.9kg; 3 months ago 67.2kg; current 69.1kg), Height (12 months ago 152.5cm; 9 months ago 152.5cm; 6 months ago 152.5cm; 3 months ago 152.5cm; current 152.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; current 98mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 107mg/g; 9 months ago 105mg/g; 6 months ago 75mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 86mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 61mg/dL; 9 months ago 61mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 61mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 174mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
